title: capnophyllum leiocarpon
intro: Capnophyllum leiocarpon, a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region, is a member of the Asteraceae family and is also known as mountain calumba or capnophyllum. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Capnophyllum leiocarpon are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used to make topical creams and ointments for skin conditions and wounds.
